mapper.select:
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0301-03_1#Sql003 */ MAX(FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) AS IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO
FCO.ACCEPT_ORDER_NO = #{acceptOrderNo}

SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0301-03_1#Sql004 */ FCO.IFA_ORDER_NO, FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, FCO.INVITATION_TYPE, FCO.ORDER_METHOD_TYPE, FCO.WARNING_APPLY_TYPE, FCO.EXPLANATION_INFO_TYPE, FCO.TRANSFER_INVITATION_TYPE, FCO.ENG_PUB_BRAND_EXP_TYPE FROM FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER FCO
FCO.ACCEPT_ORDER_NO = #{acceptOrderNo} AND FCO.IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{ifaOrderSubNo}
SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0301-03_1#Sql005 */ TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_FOREIGN_CONSIGNMENT_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 5, '0') AS IFA_ORDER_NO FROM DUAL
